nasb.text: But pasture fields of their cities shall not be sold, for that is their perpetual possession.

esv.text: But the fields of pastureland belonging to their cities may not be sold, for that is their possession forever.

cnv.text: 只是他們城郊之地不可出賣，因為是他們永遠的地業。

ccb.text: 但不可出卖利未人城郊的草场。那是他们永远拥有的产业。
